# nuvio v1.0.0 — React + Vite + Tailwind

**Stable open-source release** — maximum validated coverage for visual editing that writes back to your source files.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @nuvio/cli init --yes
pnpm dev
```

> User docs omit version pins so `dlx` always resolves to npm `latest`. This release tag is **v1.0.0**.

## What's in 1.0.0

### Vite (maximum public coverage)

- Vite **5.4+**, **6.x**, **8.x**
- Dev-only plugin — zero production bundle
- Offline source index (same parser as live dev server)

### Tailwind (maximum patch coverage)

- Tailwind **3.x** and **4.x**
- String literal `className`
- `cn()` / `clsx()` string lists
- Conditional `cn("base", flag && "token")`
- Static `classnames()` object maps
- Fail-closed on unsupported dynamic patterns

### Libraries

- **shadcn/ui** — detection, routing, example app
- **TailAdmin** — dogfood-validated dashboard editing
- **DaisyUI** — detection + native-element path

### Onboarding

- `nuvio init` — one command wiring
- **Make Editable** — click-to-tag without manual ids
- `nuvio doctor` · `nuvio scan` · `nuvio stats`

## Examples

| [examples/vite-basic](https://github.com/ehah/Nuvio/tree/main/examples/vite-basic) | Fresh Vite + click-to-tag |

| [examples/tailadmin-demo](https://github.com/ehah/Nuvio/tree/main/examples/tailadmin-demo) | Full TailAdmin dogfood |
